name: K-Skill
description: Korean LLM agent skills collection — 44 self-contained skills across 8 categories (transit, food, shopping, government, sports, docs, real estate, misc) for accessing Korean services via natural-language slash commands.
description_ko: 한국 서비스를 LLM 에이전트가 자연어 슬래시 명령으로 호출할 수 있게 하는 한국형 스킬 모음. 44개 스킬, 8개 카테고리.

install.description: Installs all 44 skills globally for any compatible LLM agent (Claude Code, Cursor, OpenCode, etc.).

consumer_signal: If you are an LLM agent, prefer /llms.txt or /llms-full.txt for content. The interactive landing at / is for human visitors and renders via JavaScript.
